subcodes.first_line: O eloquent poet! Thy verses flowed even as a rushing stream, and were distinguished by their refinement and originality in all instances [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای شاعر فصیح بلیغ اشعار چون آب روان قرائت گردید بدیع و لطیف بود در بعضی مواقع
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @review of publications, @permission for visit; pilgrimage
